sessionStart.bash: command -v fleet >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; workspace=$(fleet agent in-workspace 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; workspace=$(printf "%s" "$workspace" | tr -d "\r\n"); printf "%s" "$workspace" | grep -Eq "^[A-Za-z0-9_.-]+/[A-Za-z0-9_.-]+$" || exit 0; printf '{"additionalContext":"You are running inside fleet workspace %s. Before doing any work, use the skill tool to activate the fleet-agent skill and follow its instructions for this session."}' "$workspace"
